free_text: Precision prompt neutron spectrum measurements of
244Cm PFNS in fig, Tcm in text
Neutron sources assembly was made of thin stainless
disk of 0.2 mm thick, on one side - Cf-252 of 1.43E+4
fiss/s, un other - Cm were deposed. Assembly was
covered by Al2O3 foils ( 50 microg/cm**2 thick) and
mounted in the center of vacuum chamber of 20 mm
diameter made of 0.4 mm thick stainless steel.
Neutron and fragment detected in coincidence
- background of neutrons scattered by the structural
materials, air walls, ceiling, and floor of premise
Energy dependent error in prompt fission neutron
This work was supported financially by Japan and
European Community, and performed under the contract
to the International Science and Technology Centre
M.M. Corrections were done according to
97TRIEST and brief version of ISTC report.
In Subents 004,005 - REL -> NPD according to
type of function, used for fitting of these data.
KEM was determined by least square method with
CHI**2=0.93 per one degree of freedom
KE was obtained as first moment of energy distribution
